response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship values and some distributed systems exposure, but he critically fails the minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience as a hard floor; his resume lists only a brief 6-month stint writing C/C++ components at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, with C++ not even appearing in his skills section. His cloud infrastructure work (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is real but shallow — primarily as a user of cloud primitives in product engineering, not as a platform builder. He has no demonstrated technical leadership over cloud or DevOps engineers.
strengths: Genuine distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic — micro-services handling millions of HTTP req/s with low-latency async I/O in DLang
Strong engineering culture advocate — consistent application of TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and community mentorship through workshops and code katas
Broad multi-language polyglot background with real production experience across web, embedded, and mobile contexts
concerns: C++ experience is negligible — approximately 6 months at NI plus a thesis project, against a stated minimum requirement of 8 years; this is a hard disqualifier
No evidence of building or owning internal infrastructure/compute platforms; cloud usage is confined to AWS CDK and Kubernetes as application-layer tooling
No formal technical leadership role managing engineers, setting architectural standards at org scale, or driving ambiguous multi-team platform initiatives
